---
title: "Research Archive"
---

The main site presents the shortest scholarly reading path. This archive keeps
the workbench's status, method, provenance, validation, and maintenance details
available for readers who want to inspect how the argument was built.

## Project state

- [Project Status](project-status.qmd) is the generated pipeline snapshot.
- [Current Status](CURRENT_STATUS.md) is the maintained narrative audit of
  progress, blockers, and corpus boundaries.
- [Project Brief](PROJECT_BRIEF.md) introduces the theory and research purpose.
- [Open Decisions](OPEN_DECISIONS.md) records unresolved design choices.

## Method detail

- [Research Design](RESEARCH_DESIGN.md)
- [Primary Research Question](PRIMARY_RESEARCH_QUESTION.md)
- [MIPVU Annotation Guide](MIPVU_ANNOTATION_GUIDE.md)
- [Corpus Rights Policy](corpus-rights-policy.qmd)
- [Corpus Limitations](corpus-limitations.qmd)
- [Validation Protocol](validation-protocol.qmd)
- [Comparative Analysis Protocol](cases/x-case/protocol/comparative-analysis-protocol.md)

## Evidence and review package

- [Publication Audit Package](publication/audit-package.md)
- [Claim Traceability](publication/claim-traceability.md)
- [Validation Gate](publication/validation-gate.md)
- [AI Use Statement](publication/ai-use-statement.md)
- [Model-Reliability Disclosure](publication/model-reliability.md)
- [Data Availability](publication/data-availability.md)
- [Public Site Readiness](publication/public-site-readiness.md)

## Research infrastructure

- [Human Reliability and Adjudication Architecture](docs/reliability/human-reliability-architecture.md)
- [Human Coder Training Guide](docs/reliability/human-coder-training-guide.md)
- [Multilingual Human Coder Calibration Packets](docs/reliability/human-coder-calibration.md)
- [Multi-Model Reliability Architecture](docs/reliability/multi-model-architecture.md)
- [Multi-Model Reliability Results](model-reliability-results.qmd)
- [Multi-Model Reliability Completion Checklist](docs/reliability/model-reliability-completion-checklist.md)
- [Pipeline Upgrade Notes](PIPELINE-UPGRADE.md)
- [Future LangGraph Compatibility](FUTURE_LANGGRAPH_COMPATIBILITY.md)
- [Site Architecture](SITE_ARCHITECTURE.md)
- [Project repository](https://github.com/ashitaka-emishi/sacrifice-law-workbench)

Detailed case analyses and generated artifacts remain accessible from each
[case hub](case-selection.qmd), the [findings hub](cases/x-case/artifacts/qmd/x-case-overview.qmd),
and site search.
